race.description: Think Pink Hope Heels And Horses Hcp (72+)
race.comment: AUTO CRUISE (11) returned from a break with a narrow victory from well back in the field and she's been freshened again since. Looking for four on the bounce now and CPJ sticks with her. Goes well fresh, she still has stacks of upside and she can continue her winning run. NOTEWORTHY (6) stuck on well over the mile last start and comes back to the 1400m journey today. She maps well and the claim of Martinan comes in handy again. Racing well without winning, though this presents as a golden opportunity today. SUPERSESSION (4) is knocking on the door of another win, finishing off well over this track and trip last time out. Should be able to sit much closer from a better draw today and while the sting out of the ground is a niggle, his recent form stacks right up. OLYMPIC PARK (13) was solid on resumption from a long break and now gets the blinkers on and Pike. Sharp improvement is expected. BATTLE COMMANDER (5) is better than he showed last time and won't be far away.
